flags.concern: Timeline agent shot linking: the plan never adds the clip->generation/shot resolution and multi-anchor linking needed to create or reuse a shot from selected timeline media, so the new shot path would either be empty or only attach a single anchor.
flags.evidence: The incoming selection payload only carries clip_id/url/media_type (`supabase/functions/ai-timeline-agent/index.ts:11-30`), while the shot RPCs operate on generation IDs (`create_shot_with_image` needs `p_generation_id`, `add_generation_to_shot` needs `p_generation_id`: `src/integrations/supabase/types.ts:1772-1783`, `src/integrations/supabase/types.ts:1999-2010`). The timeline registry can expose `generationId` (`src/tools/video-editor/types/index.ts:135-143`), but the plan's Step 2/Step 4 only mentions `insert_shot_at_position` or optional single-generation linking and never covers resolving selected clips to generation IDs, attaching multiple selected anchors, or checking whether the anchors already belong to a reusable shot as required by the user note.

flags.concern: Timeline agent i2v scope: the plan still narrows image-to-video out of the implementation and its proposed tool schema cannot express the existing `travel_between_images` contract, so it misses an explicitly in-scope feature.
flags.evidence: The accepted override says image-to-video is in scope via `travel_between_images` (`.megaplan/plans/feature-timeline-agent-task-20260403-2324/state.json:59-63`), but the plan metadata still assumes 'Image-to-video is out of scope' (`.megaplan/plans/feature-timeline-agent-task-20260403-2324/plan_v1.meta.json:50-56`) and the proposed `create_task` schema only supports `text-to-image|style-transfer|subject-transfer|scene-transfer` plus a single `reference_image_url` (`.megaplan/plans/feature-timeline-agent-task-20260403-2324/plan_v1.md:46-78`). The repository already has a `travel_between_images` resolver, and it requires structured arrays like `image_urls`, `base_prompts`, `segment_frames`, and `frame_overlap` (`supabase/functions/create-task/resolvers/travelBetweenImages.ts:16-20`, `supabase/functions/create-task/resolvers/travelBetweenImages.ts:133-147`).
